# Crackly

> An online examination platform for JEE, NEET & CET preparation. Students practice with authentic exam-pattern MCQ tests while admins manage classes, schedule tests, and track performance.

Crackly helps engineering and medical aspirants prepare for India's toughest entrance exams through timed mock tests, chapter-wise practice, detailed analytics, and progress tracking. Coaching institutes and tuition classes can manage their students, unlock tests for specific batches, and review comprehensive performance reports.

## Pages

- [Home](/landing): Product overview, features, and call-to-action for students and coaching institutes.

## Optional

- [Get Started](/auth): Login and signup for students, admins, and super admins.
